query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_products,
  SUM(CASE WHEN v.product_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as products_with_variants,
  SUM(CASE WHEN v.product_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as products_without_variants
FROM erp_products p
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT DISTINCT product_id FROM erp_product_variants
) v ON v.product_id = p.id;
